articles.summary: 提出DeepSearch-Evolve自蒸馏框架，训练工具使用智能体从自身经验改进。在可验证环境中利用自生成轨迹进行蒸馏，避免监督微调依赖固定教师轨迹，实现长程交互中的自我提升。

articles.title: EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World
articles.excerpt: This paper introduces EvolvingWorld, a framework and benchmark for character and world co-evolution in interactive literary worlds. Existing systems either treat interactive literary simulation as static persona imitation or isolated scene generation, failing to capture how characters and worlds evo
articles.summary: 介绍EvolvingWorld框架与基准，支持角色与文学世界的协同演化。区别于静态角色模仿或孤立场景生成，该框架通过交互式叙事动态更新角色和世界状态，提升生成故事的连贯性和沉浸感。

articles.title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
articles.excerpt: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. While existing context pruning methods such as SWE-Pruner realize this by attaching a separate code classifier, we find the agent itself encodes internal representations indicating the relevance of c
articles.summary: 提出SWE-Pruner Pro，利用编码LLM自身内部表征（而非外部分类器）进行上下文剪枝。通过分析注意力激活，识别无关代码片段并移除，在不影响性能前提下压缩长上下文，提升编码智能体效率。

articles.title: Xiaomi-Robotics-1: Scaling Vision-Language-Action Models with over 100K Hours of Real-World Trajectories
articles.excerpt: We present Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a foundational vision-language-action (VLA) model capable of (1) following diverse language instructions to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in unseen environments out-of-the-box, and (2) efficiently adapting to novel downstream tasks with minimal fine-
articles.summary: 发布Xiaomi-Robotics-1基础视觉-语言-动作模型，基于10万小时真实机器人轨迹训练。支持零样本执行多样化移动操作任务，并通过少量微调快速适应新任务，在未见环境中表现优异。

articles.title: xHC: Expanded Hyper-Connections
articles.excerpt: Hyper-Connections (HC) expand the residual stream of Transformers into N parallel streams, providing a form of memory scaling beyond model width and depth. Manifold-Constrained HC (mHC) stabilizes this formulation at scale. The large gains from N{=}1 to N{=}4 suggest residual-stream expansion as a p
articles.summary: 扩展超连接（Hyper-Connections）方法，将Transformer残差流扩展为N个并行流，实现超越宽度和深度的记忆扩展。流形约束版本mHC稳定训练，实验表明N从1增至4带来显著性能提升。

articles.title: Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare
articles.excerpt: Healthcare spans high-stakes communication, expert reasoning, and workflow execution, yet specialized LLMs that cover these use cases together remain limited. A healthcare model must handle patient consultation, clinical reasoning over text and images, interactive diagnosis, and electronic health re
articles.summary: 发布Cura 1T专业医疗模型，覆盖患者咨询、临床推理、交互诊断与电子健康记录管理等场景。支持文本和多模态输入，在多项医疗基准上达到领先水平，填补通用LLM在专业医疗应用中的空白。

articles.title: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement
articles.excerpt: Human-object centric video personalization (HOCVP) is a core task within subject-driven video generation. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations. First, most approaches focusing on inter-subject personalization still struggle to strike a balance between high subject fidelity and a
articles.summary: 提出HOMIE，面向人-物中心视频个性化生成的方法。通过多模态增强，在保持主体高保真度的同时实现更好的运动控制，解决现有方法在主体保真与动作一致性间的平衡问题。

articles.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation is an alternative post-training method in reinforcement learning that alleviates the constraints imposed by reward models by providing token-level supervision from a teacher model. Although on-policy distillation has been studied and applied across various settings, its fundam
articles.summary: 研究在线策略蒸馏作为RL后训练方法，通过教师模型的token级监督替代奖励模型约束。分析其理论基础，在多种设置下验证有效性，为减轻奖励模型限制提供新途径。

articles.title: Apple-π: Benchmarking Thinking with Video Towards Law-Grounded Physical Intelligence
articles.excerpt: Modern video generation models are increasingly hailed as emerging world models with an internalized grasp of physical law. Yet existing benchmarks largely evaluate physical plausibility only at the output level, without verifying whether the model arrives there through a faithful, law-grounded reas
articles.summary: 提出Apple-π基准，评估视频生成模型是否真正理解物理规律。不同于仅检查输出合理性，该基准检测模型内部推理是否遵循物理法则，推动生成模型向忠实世界模型发展。

articles.title: RynnBrain 1.1: Towards More Capable and Generalizable Embodied Foundation Model
articles.excerpt: We present RynnBrain 1.1, a family of embodied foundation models spanning 2B, 9B, and 122B-A10B scales. Trained with a unified spatio-temporal and physically grounded framework, RynnBrain 1.1 supports embodied perception, spatial reasoning, localization, and planning. Compared with RynnBrain 1.0, it
articles.summary: 发布RynnBrain 1.1具身基础模型家族（2B/9B/122B-A10B），采用统一时空物理框架训练。支持具身感知、空间推理、定位与规划，性能超越RynnBrain 1.0，提升泛化能力。

articles.title: ReflectWorld-MM: An Entity-Oriented Multimodal Memory System for Open-Ended Video Streams
articles.excerpt: Building assistants that can continually watch the world, remember what they see, and reason over their accumulated experience is a long-standing goal, and recently multimodal agents equipped with long-term memory over video streams have attracted increasing interest. Unfortunately, existing systems
articles.summary: 提出ReflectWorld-MM多模态记忆系统，为开放视频流提供实体导向的长时记忆。支持持续观看、记忆与推理，相比现有系统能更有效地组织多源信息，提升问答与检索质量。

articles.title: Qwen-Music Technical Report
articles.excerpt: In this report, we introduce Qwen-Music, a powerful music generation model capable of producing highly musical and high-fidelity songs with complete vocal singing. Qwen-Music supports two core tasks: Text to Music Generation, which create entirely new songs from text descriptions, lyrics, and musica
articles.summary: 介绍Qwen-Music音乐生成模型，支持文本到音乐创作和参考音乐续写，可生成完整人声歌曲。采用大语言模型架构，在音质、音乐性和可控性上表现突出。

articles.title: GigaChat Audio: Time-aware Large Audio Language Model
articles.excerpt: Temporal grounding in long recordings remains challenging for audio-conditioned LLMs. We present a time-aware audio LLM that answers questions with explicit timestamps over up to 120 minutes of input. Our approach interleaves periodic time markers with continuous audio tokens using large-scale synth
articles.summary: 提出GigaChat Audio时间感知音频LLM，支持长达120分钟输入并回答带显式时间戳的问题。通过周期性时间标记与连续音频token交错，利用大规模合成数据训练，实现长音频精准时间定位。

articles.title: Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: Entropy control has become an effective tool in reinforcement learning (RL) of large language models (LLMs), helping balance exploration-exploitation trade-off during alignment process. Such RL paradigm is often conducted on mixtures of heterogeneous tasks, which induce distinct entropy regimes unde
articles.summary: 提出组熵控策略优化方法，在LLM强化学习中对异构任务混合熵进行自适应控制。通过分组调控探索-利用平衡，优于固定熵方法，提升对齐阶段性能。

articles.title: Recursive Harness Self-Improvement
articles.excerpt: Under model--harness co-evolution, harnesses are not merely inference-time scaffolds but data-generating components whose execution traces can shape future foundation models. This motivates harness-in-the-loop learning: optimizing harnesses for both immediate agent performance and the quality of tra
articles.summary: 提出递归自改进框架，将harness视为数据生成组件并优化其生成轨迹质量。通过harness与模型的协同演化，使执行轨迹既提升当前智能体性能，又为新模型训练提供优质数据。

articles.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?
articles.excerpt: Muon is competitive with AdamW in large-scale pre-training, but its value for reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training remains unclear. articles.summary: 研究Muon优化器在智能体强化学习中的效果。在ALFWorld上用Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct对比AdamW，发现使用Group-in-Group策略时Muon在稀疏奖励场景下训练更稳定，收敛更快。

articles.title: FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry
articles.excerpt: In line with the prevailing direction of vision research, we explore the integration of both generation and editing capabilities for video and image modalities within a single model. Current approaches to collecting video editing data typically depend on labour-intensive, time-consuming curated proc
articles.summary: 提出FlowMimic，通过像素对扭曲流场生成视频编辑数据，无需人工标注。统一视频和图像生成与编辑能力于单一模型，实现高质量、高效率的视觉内容编辑与生成。

articles.title: Environment-free Synthetic Data Generation for API-Calling Agents
articles.excerpt: Training API-calling large language model (LLM) agents demands massive amounts of high-quality trajectories. articles.title: S1-Omni: A Unified Multimodal Reasoning Model for Scientific Understanding, Prediction, and Generation
articles.excerpt: We present S1-Omni, a unified multimodal reasoning model for scientific understanding, prediction, and generation. AI for Science (AI4S) has advanced significantly through domain-specific models, tool-augmented LLMs, and scientific language models. However, model capabilities remain highly fragmente

articles.title: DiffGI: Differentiable Geometry Images for High-Fidelity Thin-Shell 3D Generation
articles.excerpt: Existing 3D generative models predominantly rely on implicit volumetric representations, which enforce watertight topology and struggle to represent thin-shell and non-manifold geometries such as garments. Geometry image-based approaches offer a surface-centric alternative, but existing methods rely

articles.title: VideoRAE: Taming Video Foundation Models for Generative Modeling via Representation Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: Video generative models commonly rely on latent spaces learned by 3D Variational Autoencoders (3D-VAEs). However, conventional 3D-VAEs are mainly optimized for pixel-level reconstruction, which can limit the semantic and spatio-temporal structure captured by their latents. Meanwhile, Video Foundatio

articles.title: DSWorld: A Data Science World Model for Efficient Autonomous Agents
articles.excerpt: Despite strong capabilities in data understanding and decision-making, autonomous data science agents still heavily rely on trial-and-error workflows that involve expensive computation. This bottleneck motivates models that can anticipate the effects of data science operations before real execution.

articles.title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model from an LLM-as-a-Judg

articles.title: Distilled Reinforcement Learning for LLM Post-training
articles.excerpt: Large language model (LLM) post-training is essential for improving reasoning, adaptation, and alignment. articles.title: Behavioral Privacy Leakage in Agentic Negotiation: Formalizing and Mitigating Inference Attacks via Randomized Policies
articles.excerpt: Autonomous negotiation agents are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings such as insurance and procurement. While cryptographic techniques protect explicitly disclosed constraint values, they fail to address a subtler threat: behavioral privacy leakage, where an adversary infers private const

articles.title: Agon: Competitive Cross-Model RL with Implicit Rival Grading of Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (e.g. GRPO) is the engine behind today's reasoning models, yet it grades only the final answer. On hard problems this trains models to write more rather than to think better, since the trace itself is never graded and no label for good thinking exists.

articles.title: Self-State Attacks on Self-Hosted AI Agents: How Far Can OS Defenses Go?
articles.excerpt: Self-hosted AI agents read and write their own memory and configuration files to function. articles.title: 中国宣扬“开放普惠” 与美竞逐AI全球治理主导权
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/中国宣扬-开放普惠-与美竞逐ai全球治理主导权/a-78052236?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 在上海举行的世界AI大会（WAIC）首次由国家主席习近平亲自出席并阐述全球AI治理主张。随着中国不断缩小与美在AI领域差距，并试图推动以“开源普惠”为核心的国际叙事，中美围绕AI的竞争正从技术层面走向更广泛的产业、规则与全球影响力之争。
articles.summary: 在上海举行的世界AI大会（WAIC）上，国家主席习近平首次出席并阐述全球AI治理主张。中国推动“开源普惠”国际叙事，与美在AI技术、产业、规则和影响力方面展开竞争。

articles.title: 德语媒体：Kimi时刻到来 – 西方必须正视中国的成功
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：kimi时刻到来-西方必须正视中国的成功/a-78052610?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 《新苏黎世报》发表评论称，Kimi K3模型发布引起的轰动效应足以说明，西方已经不能再继续漠视中国的高科技实力了。《法兰克福汇报》评论称，德国车企如果不尽快找到应对中国挑战的策略，德国汽车工业就将面临生存考验。
articles.summary: 《新苏黎世报》评论称Kimi K3模型发布轰动，西方不能再漠视中国高科技实力。《法兰克福汇报》警告德国车企若不尽快应对中国挑战，将面临生存考验。

articles.title: 中菲互召大使 美澳谴责中国采取危险行动
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/中菲互召大使-美澳谴责中国采取危险行动/a-78049527?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 中国海警人员和菲律宾海军人员在南中国海上坐滩军舰“马德雷山”号附近发生冲突，导致菲方一名人员受伤后，中方次日召见菲律宾驻华大使，提出严正抗议。而菲总统马科斯也召见了中国驻马尼拉大使井泉。美国和澳大利亚方面则谴责中国船只针对菲律宾船只所采取的行动是“破坏稳定且危险“。

articles.title: “够了！”德铁宣布德国火车站将全面禁酒
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/够了！-德铁宣布德国火车站将全面禁酒/a-78048672?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 在近日发生醉酒乘客导致铁路员工重伤的事件后，德国铁路公司（德铁）宣布，自今年秋季起，德国所有火车站将全面禁酒，希望借此提升秩序与安全。不过，目前尚无全面禁止在列车内饮酒的计划。德铁本身在其长途列车上销售酒精类饮品。

articles.title: 日本《皇室典范》修正 女性仍无皇室继承权
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/日本《皇室典范》修正-女性仍无皇室继承权/a-78048223?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 日本德仁天皇目前仅有三位皇位继承人，分别是他的弟弟及弟弟的儿子，以及他90岁的叔父。对皇位继承法的修正旨在维系仅允许男性继承皇位的做法，尽管七成受访民众支持有一位女性天皇。

articles.title: 德语媒体：台湾的“黄蜂巢”战略

articles.title: 销售非法商品 欧盟对全球速卖通罚款5.5亿欧元

articles.title: 伯纳姆正式接棒 成为英国新任首相

articles.title: 菲律宾指责中方殴打菲海军人员 中方回应称“歪曲事实”

articles.title: “德国制造”不香了 德国对华出口暴跌

articles.title: 热浪席卷欧洲：人人都想要中国空调

articles.excerpt: 中国是全球遥遥领先的空调生产大国，随着近期热浪来袭，欧洲对空调的需求也明显上升，不少中国制造的空调成为抢手货，在欧洲“一机难求”。然而，针对中国产能过剩的争议始终存在。

articles.title: 默茨呼吁中国放开人民币汇率：不会再容忍扭曲竞争

articles.excerpt: 德国总理默茨在德法部长级理事会会议上呼吁中国政府放开人民币汇率。他和马克龙强调希望通过对话解决分歧，但不会继续容忍损害欧洲产业和就业的扭曲竞争。

articles.title: 加强联合防务 德国将首次参与法国核演习

articles.title: 海外代孕争议持续 德国执政党议会党团主席辞职

articles.excerpt: 曾明确反对代孕的前卫生部长施潘在海外代孕得子并引发舆论风波之后，已辞去议会党团主席一职。此争议也再次点燃德国社会对代孕合法化与伦理问题的讨论。

articles.title: 长平观察：中共对台湾的“外包镇压”

articles.title: 德语媒体：中国足球为什么圆不了“强国梦”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：中国足球为什么圆不了-强国梦/a-78011415?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 中国很早以前就制定了在2030年前成为“世界一流足球强国”的目标。但迄今为止，成效却差强人意，《法兰克福汇报》分析了其中的可能原因。《商报》评论认为，德国汽车工业当前的困境纯属咎由自取，是长期依赖单一市场，又不重视技术转型的必然结果。

articles.title: 中国AI公司月之暗面发布全球最大规模开源模型

articles.title: 习近平倡议中国建立全球AI新秩序 挑战美国主导地位

articles.title: 台湾立法者将为“星链”来台扫除法律障碍
